parameters: \#The Empire... It freely manipulated people, countries, and laws.
\#It was the largest and most powerful country in the land.
\#The demons were forced into an impossible battle by the Emperor
\#and made to dance in the palm of his hand, yet they had no
\#choice but to fight and win if they wanted to survive.
\#Despite that, the Empire didn't stir. The days passed by peacefully...
\#After several months, the demons made the first move.
\#They attacked Bohelos... and one year passed.
